title: cherleria arctica
intro: Cherleria arctica, also known as Arctic tansy or Elsholtzia, is a flowering plant native to the Arctic tundra in North America and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cherleria arctica include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Cherleria arctica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
